task_completion.description: Verify that the patient's name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Marcus Delgado' entered in the patient name field of the GNU Health new patient form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Date of Birth and Sex are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '1978-11-22' (or equivalent date format) in the Date of Birth field and 'Male' selected in the Sex field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Blood Type is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'A+' selected or entered in the Blood Type field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Marital Status is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Married' selected in the Marital Status dropdown or field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Primary Care Doctor is assigned correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Cordara, Cameron' entered or selected in the Primary Care Doctor field.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Patient's Unique Identification (PUID) is generated and the record is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a generated alphanumeric code in the PUID (Patient Unique Identifier) field and indicators that the record has been saved (e.g., a 'Saved' status, inactive save button, or the record appearing in the patient list).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health desktop client window being interacted with, rather than terminal commands executing SQL or Python scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is using the actual GNU Health application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window should clearly be GNU Health (Tryton client), not a text editor, web browser showing a mock page, or a spreadsheet.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected answers into a text document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient details must be entered into the specific form fields of the GNU Health application, not written in a generic text file or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Patient Name: Marcus Delgado. Expected Date of Birth: 1978-11-22. Expected Sex: Male. Expected Blood Type: A+. Expected Marital Status: Married. Expected Primary Care Doctor: Cordara, Cameron. The task requires generating a Patient's Unique Identification (PUID) within the GNU Health system.
